child_spec.name: iter_0003_island0_drop_then_smaller
child_spec.reasoning_summary: 1d_cnn iter_0002 gained nothing material (0.451->0.454) and still overfit (gap +0.096). Shrinking was wrong axis. Try regularization axis: increase dropout via deeper but THIN: depth 3->5, base_channels 24->16, kernel 7->5. Plus adamw with higher implicit wd.
